data.title: GO Airport Shuttle offers 10% discount for FIFA attendees in World Cup host cities. Book now at GOWithUs.com.
data.description: On January 20, 2026, GO Airport Shuttle, known as GOWithUs.com, a leading airport ground transportation company in North America, announced a special promotion. They are providing a ten percent discount for FIFA attendees in almost all World Cup host cities. This offer is available for fans, families, and all attendees booking airport transportation services through the company.

data.title: Flexcompute and Bramble CFD join forces to enhance motorsport simulation with Flow360 and cloud platform.
data.description: Flexcompute has introduced its GPU-native Flow360 technology, which, when integrated with Bramble CFD's cloud platform and motorsport knowledge, offers pre-configured simulation processes for enhancing high-performance vehicle aerodynamics. This development was disclosed in Boston on January 20, 2026.

data.title: BDR's SPARK 2026 conference attracts hundreds of contractors for keynotes & sessions in Seattle on Jan 20, 2026.
data.description: In Seattle on January 20, 2026, the annual conference offered HVAC, plumbing, and electrical contractors valuable information on marketing strategies and expanding their businesses. Business Development Resources (BDR), a leading provider of business coaching and marketing services for home service professionals, hosted the event. Attendees gained actionable insights to foster growth in their respective industries.

data.title: Chef Joe Sasto collaborates with Doich Snacking Dough for limited-edition Birthday Cake flavor, benefiting No Kid Hungry.
data.description: Chicago-based celebrity chef Joe Sasto is introducing a special limited-edition Birthday Cake flavor of Doich Snacking Dough to raise funds for non-profit organization No Kid Hungry. The proceeds from the sales will benefit the charity, which aims to alleviate childhood hunger. The fundraiser is set to take place on January 20, 2026. Joe Sasto, known for his appearances on the Food Network and Bravo's Top Chef, aims to make a positive impact by merging his culinary expertise with philanthropy.

data.title: IHG Owners Assoc. appoints Prakash Maggan as Chair of Global Board of  Directors for 2026. Financial expert from Rainmaker Hospitality.
data.description: In Atlanta on January 20, 2026, the IHG Owners Association has appointed Prakash Maggan, Principal & CFO of Rainmaker Hospitality, as the Chair of its Global Board of Directors for the year 2026. Maggan, known for his expertise in financial management and operational proficiency, will lead the board in strategic decision-making and oversight.

data.title: Microtek Learning LLC partners with PECB to offer cybersecurity training/certification for federal agencies.
data.description: In Silver Spring, Maryland, on January 20, 2026, Microtek Learning LLC, a prominent global provider of professional IT and cybersecurity training, revealed a new partnership with PECB, a well-known certification body. The collaboration aims to offer PECB cybersecurity training and certification worldwide.

data.title: Kelley Robinson, president of HRC, joins Kettering Foundation Board to fight for democracy.
data.description: Kelley Robinson, the president of the Human Rights Campaign and Human Rights Campaign Foundation, has taken on a new role in the fight for democracy, as announced by the Charles F. Kettering Foundation in Dayton, Ohio on January 20, 2026. Robinson's transition marks a significant development in the realm of human rights advocacy, with her departure from her current position having notable implications for the future direction of the organization. This move is poised to bring about changes in leadership within the Human Rights Campaign, presenting both challenges and opportunities for the promotion of democracy and equality.

data.title: Risk & Insurance Education Alliance launches CIRP program in Austin, TX, aiming to boost technical skills, with a focus on commercial lines.
data.description: In Austin, Texas on January 20, 2026, the Risk & Insurance Education Alliance introduced the Certified Insurance & Risk Professional (CIRP) designation. This program aims to enhance technical expertise, sales aptitude, and customer-centric skills in the commercial lines sector.

data.title: myCUmortgage forms partnerships with 7 credit unions, totaling 100,000 members and assets over $1.8 billion.
data.description: In a recent announcement on January 20, 2026, myCUmortgage revealed exciting new partnerships with seven credit unions across the country in the fourth quarter of 2025. These new collaborations have significantly expanded myCUmortgage's reach, now representing a total of 100,000 members and managing assets exceeding $1.8 billion. The partnerships, spread from coast to coast, mark a significant milestone for myCUmortgage as it continues to strengthen its presence in the credit union sector.

data.title: Rembrandt Charms named Ella Blum as Director of Creative and Brand Strategy as of Jan 5, 2026.
data.description: In Buffalo, New York on January 20, 2026, Rembrandt Charms, known for being the largest charm collection featuring sterling silver and gold, has appointed Ella Blum as the Director of Creative and Brand Strategy. Ella Blum assumed this role on January 5, 2026. This new position was established to enhance the company's creative direction and brand strategy.

BESSENT: PRESIDENT WORRIED THAT US WOULD BE CALLED TO DEFEND GREELAND IN CASE OF INCURSION

data.title: Heitman raises $2.6 billion for Value-Add Investment Series, surpassing $2 billion target with $620 million co-investment.
data.description: The global real estate investment management firm Heitman LLC disclosed the successful close of Heitman Value Partners Fund VI (“HVP VI” or “the fund”) based in Chicago. This fund secured commitments amounting to $2 billion, surpassing its initial $1.75 billion objective and hitting the fund’s hard cap. This stands out as Heitman's most significant closed-end fundraising effort yet. Moreover, investors pledged an extra $620 million of co-investment capital to the fund.

data.title: Emily Strain promoted to lead Workplace Interiors at Corgan, succeeding Lindsay Wilson, to focus on as President.
data.description: A well-known architecture and design firm in Dallas, Corgan, has recently announced the promotion of Emily Strain as the new Workplace Interiors Sector Leader. Strain will be responsible for guiding the sector's strategic development and expansion, leveraging her proven track record of creativity and management within the company. She takes over from Lindsay Wilson, who will now concentrate solely on her duties as the President, stepping down from her previous dual position as Workplace Interiors Sector Leader and firm President. This move signifies a shift in leadership within the firm, with Strain poised to lead the sector's growth initiatives.

data.title: Latin Metals completes 27 km of IP surveying at Cerro Bayo Gold-Silver Project in Argentina with option partner Daura Gold.
data.description: Latin Metals has successfully finished an IP survey spanning 27 kilometers at the Cerro Bayo Gold-Silver Project in partnership with Daura Gold.
DANISH PENSION FUND AKADEMIKERPENSION TO EXIT US TREASURIES
DAVOS-U.S. TREASURY'S BESSENT: PRESIDENT HAS STRONG VIEW ON WESTERN HEMISPHERE SECURITY

data.title: Corporación América Airports announces receipt of $91,205,056 payment from Peru for ICSID Arbitration Award.
data.description: Corporación América Airports S.A. (NYSE: CAAP), a top private airport operator, shared that its affiliate Sociedad Aeroportuaria Kuntur Wasi S.A. ("Kuntur Wasi"), where CAAP has a 50% indirect stake, recently got a payment of US$91,205,056 from the Republic of Peru. This amount was received following the final verdict given by the International Centre for Settlement of Investment Disputes ("ICSID" or "CIADI" in Spanish).

data.title: Thompson and PCA NC partner to empower Charlotte families with mental health & practical support in Mecklenburg and Gaston counties, benefiting families in the Charlotte region - promoting resilience and unity.
data.description: Thompson, the oldest social services organization in North Carolina, has partnered with Positive Childhood Alliance North Carolina (PCANC) to enhance prevention-focused mental health services for families in Mecklenburg and Gaston counties. This collaboration aims to provide practical support to families in the greater Charlotte region. The goal is to ensure that more families have access to necessary resources to remain strong and resilient. This partnership comes at a crucial time as it seeks to support families in need.

data.title: Hasbro reveals new board members, enhancing its team.
data.description: A recent study reported that the global population is estimated to reach 8 billion by 2025, with a current count of 7.8 billion inhabitants. The research also found that over 800 million people around the world are currently suffering from hunger, while 1.3 billion tons of food gets wasted annually. The study suggests that global food production needs to increase by 60% to meet the demands of the growing population. Furthermore, it was noted that around 2 billion people, or 26% of the total population, are experiencing moderate to severe food insecurity. This situation is even more critical due to the ongoing effects of natural disasters and the COVID-19 pandemic, which have exacerbated food shortages in many regions. The study underscores the urgent need for worldwide efforts to address food insecurity and promote sustainable food production in order to ensure food security for all.
